zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnieszka of Poland於1137年出生在波蘭可拉可福斯吉時，她的父親Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III51歲，母親Salome von Berg-Schelklingen47歲。她於1176年與Mścisław II Izjasławicz Rurykowicz結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1182年之後。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Poland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hampshire called Poland, which probably derives from Old English Pōling or Pulling ‘pool place’. Alternatively, it may be a variant of any of the similar (like-sounding) English surnames, such as Pulham and Pullen , altered by folk etymology to conform to the name of the country in central Europe.
Irish (County Offaly, also Armagh and Down): variant of   Polin  . Compare   Polan  .
German: ethnic name from Middle High German Polan ‘Poland’ + excrescent -d, denoting an ethnic Pole or someone with Polish connections.

variants.name: Poling
meanings: Probably from German habitational name from Polling (Bavaria, Austria).

English (Sussex and Hampshire) and Irish: variant of either Poland or Powling, either a habitational name from Poling in Sussex, or a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English polling, a derivative of Middle English polle ‘head, hair of the head’ or pollen ‘to cut (hair), shave (someone's head)’ + the noun-forming suffix -ing. It may have been given to someone with a distinctive head of hair or who had a shaven head.

variants.name: Polland
meanings: German: variant of   Poland   or   Pollan  .

variants.name: Pulham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Pulham, in Norfolk, Dorset, and Devon. The placenames derive from Old English pōl, pull ‘pool’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

variants.name: Pollins
meanings: English, Irish and Scottish: variant of Poland , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Agnieszka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.description: "Armies of Prince Andrey Bogolyubskiy of Vladimir-Suzdal' sack Kiev. Andrey assumes title ""Grand Prince of Kiev and all Rus'""but chooses to reside in Suzdal'."

en.lifeSummary: When Agnieszka of Poland was born in 1137, in Kraków, Poland, her father, Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III, was 51 and her mother, Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, was 47. She married Mścisław II Izjasławicz Rurykowicz in 1176. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died after 1182.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnieszka of Poland est née en 1137, à krakowskie, Pologne, son père, Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Mścisław II Izjasławicz Rurykowicz en 1176. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée après 1182.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnieszka of Poland è nata il nel 1137 nel krakowskie, Polonia, sua padre, Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Mścisław II Izjasławicz Rurykowicz nel 1176. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì dopo il 1182.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnieszka of Poland(이)가 1137년 폴란드 크라코우스키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Salome von Berg-Schelklingen(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1176년 Mścisław II Izjasławicz Rurykowicz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1182년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnieszka of Poland родилась в 1137 г. в местности кракоуски, Польша, её отцу по имени Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mścisław II Izjasławicz Rurykowicz в 1176 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла после 1182 г.
